instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow park engagement only when the vehicle is stationary.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit park gear engagement when Vehicle_Speed equals zero.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed = 0 THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > 0 THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > 0 AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow park engagement only when the brake pedal is pressed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable park engagement when Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when the engine speed exceeds limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_RPM THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Trigger_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement during ECU startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit park engagement when TCU_State equals Startup.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Normal_Operation THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF TCU_State = Startup AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF TCU_State = Initialization THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when throttle demand is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Throttle_Position exceeds Throttle_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position <= Throttle_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position > Critical_Throttle THEN Trigger_Safety_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow park engagement only when gear position equals neutral.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit park engagement when Gear_Position equals Neutral.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Neutral THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Neutral THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when transmission oil temperature exceeds limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable park engagement when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Trigger_Thermal_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement during actuator faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Shift_Actuator_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = FALSE THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement during CAN communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit park engagement when CAN_Communication_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = FALSE THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Communication_Status = Lost THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when battery voltage is below safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Battery_Voltage falls below Voltage_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Battery_Voltage >= Voltage_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Limit AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Voltage_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Battery_Voltage < Critical_Voltage THEN Trigger_Power_Fault

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow park engagement only when engine is running.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit park engagement when Engine_Running_Status equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Running_Status = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Status_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement when multiple sensor faults are present.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject park engagement when Sensor_Fault_Count exceeds threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Fault_Count > Fault_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count <= Fault_Limit THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count > Fault_Limit AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Fault_Status = Critical THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Sensor_Fault_Count > Fault_Limit THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent park engagement during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable park engagement when TCU_State equals Limp_Mode.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode THEN Park_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State != Limp_Mode THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode AND Shift_Request = Park THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Limp_Mode = TRUE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF System_Reset = TRUE THEN Park_Engagement = Enabled
